name: Calculadora TAE
description: Converta uma taxa nominal na taxa anual efetiva.
seo_description: Converta uma taxa nominal na taxa anual efetiva. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantânea Usado por profissionais e estudantes em todo o mundo.
example_label: Converting 9% nominal annual rate compounded monthly to effective annual rate (EAR/APR).
result_context: The apr of {apr}% is the effective annual rate, showing true cost including compounding effects.
mistakes: Comparing loans using nominal rates instead of effective rates
Not considering fees that increase true borrowing cost
Confusing APR with APY (APY includes compounding)
